evals.prompt: How do I find VP Sales contacts at mid-market SaaS companies using Seamless.AI?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guidance on using Seamless.AI Prospector with filters for title, industry, and company size, plus credit optimization tips

assertions.name: uses_prospector
assertions.description: Response explains using the Prospector search with appropriate filters (title, industry, employee count/revenue)

assertions.name: mentions_credits
assertions.description: Response addresses credit consumption — each reveal costs 1 credit, search/browse is free

assertions.name: recommends_buyer_intent
assertions.description: Response suggests layering Buyer Intent signals to prioritize which contacts to reveal first

evals.prompt: I want to set up Buyer Intent and Job Changes tracking in Seamless.AI to prioritize my outreach. How?
evals.expected_output: Configuration guidance for Buyer Intent topic selection and Job Changes monitoring with outreach timing recommendations

assertions.name: intent_setup
assertions.description: Response explains selecting intent topics relevant to the user's product category and how scoring works

assertions.name: job_changes_setup
assertions.description: Response explains Job Changes tracking and the 90-day window for new leader buying decisions

assertions.name: plan_gating
assertions.description: Response mentions that Buyer Intent and Job Changes are Pro/Enterprise features — not available on Free or Basic plans

evals.prompt: How do I use the Seamless.AI API to automatically enrich contacts from my CRM?
evals.expected_output: API integration guidance covering Contact Research endpoint, async polling pattern, webhook delivery, and rate limits

assertions.name: api_endpoint
assertions.description: Response references the Contact Research endpoint (POST /contacts/research) and the poll endpoint (GET /contacts/research/poll)

assertions.name: async_pattern
assertions.description: Response explains the async research/poll pattern — submit research request, get requestIds, poll for completion or receive via webhook

assertions.name: rate_limits
assertions.description: Response mentions the ~100 requests per 60 seconds rate limit and recommends checking X-RateLimit headers
